name: calendly_list_event_types
description: List available meeting types from Calendly. Use when caller wants to see what meetings they can book.

name: calendly_create_invitee
description: Schedule a meeting via Calendly by creating an invitee. Use when caller wants to book a meeting.

name: check_availability
description: Check available time slots for a specific Calendly event.

start_time.description: Start of the time range to check (ISO 8601)

end_time.description: End of the time range to check (ISO 8601)
